items.name: dome-gallery
items.title: Dome Gallery
items.description: 3D dome-shaped image gallery with CSS transforms, drag interaction, and click-to-enlarge.

items.name: falling-text
items.title: Falling Text
items.description: Matter.js physics-based falling text where words collapse and tumble with realistic gravity.

items.name: fluid-glass
items.title: Fluid Glass
items.description: Three.js glass refraction effect with chromatic aberration shader in lens, bar, or cube mode.

items.name: galaxy
items.title: Galaxy
items.description: OGL-powered starfield galaxy with thousands of animated points and parallax depth.

items.name: ghost-cursor
items.title: Ghost Cursor
items.description: Three.js-powered ghostly cursor trail with bloom, grain, and FBM noise effects.

items.name: grid-scan
items.title: Grid Scan
items.description: Three.js animated grid with scanning line effect, bloom, chromatic aberration, and mouse-reactive distortion.

items.name: hyperspeed
items.title: Hyperspeed
items.description: Three.js highway light simulation with bloom, SMAA, distortion presets, and configurable car lights.

items.name: image-trail
items.title: Image Trail
items.description: Mouse-following image trail that spawns images at cursor position with fade and scale animations.

items.name: infinite-menu
items.title: Infinite Menu
items.description: WebGL icosahedron sphere menu with texture-mapped faces, drag rotation, and item selection.

items.name: lanyard
items.title: Lanyard
items.description: Three.js lanyard with Verlet integration rope physics, draggable badge card, and optional GLTF model.

items.name: laser-flow
items.title: Laser Flow
items.description: Three.js volumetric laser beams with fog, mouse tilt, and flow animation using GLSL shaders.

items.name: metallic-paint
items.title: Metallic Paint
items.description: Raw WebGL2 metallic paint effect with Laplacian depth solve, chromatic aberration, and mouse-driven ripples.

items.name: model-viewer
items.title: Model Viewer
items.description: Three.js 3D model viewer with OrbitControls, GLTF/FBX/OBJ support, auto-framing, and screenshot.

items.name: orbit-card-stack
items.title: Orbit Card Stack
items.description: A stacked deck of profile cards that fans out into an orbital arc on hover, lifting the active card with spring physics.

items.name: orbit-images
items.title: Orbit Images
items.description: Images orbiting along customizable path shapes including ellipse, circle, star, heart, infinity, and more.

items.name: particles
items.title: Particles
items.description: OGL particle system with velocity simulation, mouse influence, and connection lines.

items.name: pill-nav
items.title: Pill Nav
items.description: Responsive pill-shaped navigation with smooth sliding indicator and mobile hamburger menu.

items.name: pixel-trail
items.title: Pixel Trail
items.description: Mouse-following pixel trail with SVG gooey filter for a blobby, organic cursor effect.

items.name: scroll-stack
items.title: Scroll Stack
items.description: Scroll-driven stacked card animation with scale and sticky positioning effects.

items.name: splash-cursor
items.title: Splash Cursor
items.description: Full WebGL fluid simulation cursor effect with realistic ink-in-water dynamics.

items.name: staggered-menu
items.title: Staggered Menu
items.description: Full-screen staggered menu with animated text cycling, gradient backgrounds, and social links.

items.name: sticker-peel
items.title: Sticker Peel
items.description: Interactive sticker peel effect with CSS clip-path, SVG lighting filters, and drag interaction.

items.name: target-cursor
items.title: Target Cursor
items.description: Animated crosshair cursor that snaps to target elements with corner brackets and smooth lerp tracking.
